memory_entries.text: SQLite product DB structure: electronics dataset is group g2 (items_g2, taxn_g2, fdbk_g2). items_g2 columns include ref_id, ttl, avg_rtg, prc (integer cents), prc_usd (REAL dollars), str_nm, main_cat, feat_lst, img_ct. taxn_g2 has ref_id, cat_lvl, cat_nm; top-level categories for electronics use cat_lvl=1 (e.g. 'Computers & Accessories').
